scripts.lint:summary: NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 eslint . --format json | node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'),d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(0,'utf-8')),r={},f={};let t=0;d.forEach(o=>o.messages.forEach(m=>{if(m.severity===2){t++;const i=m.ruleId||'(no rule)';r[i]=(r[i]||0)+1;f[o.filePath]=(f[o.filePath]||0)+1}}));console.log('Total errors: '+t);console.log('\nTop 15 worst rules:');Object.entries(r).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).slice(0,15).forEach(e=>console.log(String(e[1]).padStart(6)+' '+e[0]));console.log('\nTop 20 worst files:');Object.entries(f).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).slice(0,20).forEach(e=>console.log(String(e[1]).padStart(4)+' '+path.relative(process.cwd(),e[0])));"
scripts.lint:ai:
npm run lint:summary && echo "

笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武
             COPY THE SUMMARY ABOVE + THIS PROMPT
笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武笊絶武

You are an elite TypeScript engineer fixing a large monorepo with the absolute strictest config possible in 2025:
- strictTypeChecked + stylisticTypeChecked
- no any, no unknown, no non-null assertions, no 'as' assertions, no @ts-ignore ever

Current lint status is printed above.

Fix in this exact priority order (do NOT skip steps):
1. All no-explicit-any + no-restricted-types (unknown)
2. All strict-boolean-expressions
3. All no-unnecessary-condition (run lint:fix first!)
4. All no-unsafe-* rules
5. Everything else

Start with the worst files shown above.
After every batch of fixes, run:
npm run lint:summary
and show me the new numbers.

Make clean, PR-ready changes only. Never weaken the rules.
Go. 噫
"
scripts.lint:focus: npm run lint:any || npm run lint:bool || npm run lint:condition || npm run lint:unsafe || npm run lint
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test
scripts.validate:ci: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test -- --coverage
scripts.claude-workflow:docker:up: export DOCKER_GID=$(getent group docker | cut -d: -f3) && PROJECT_PATH=${PROJECT_PATH:-$HOME} docker compose -f .claude/docker-compose.yml up -d
scripts.claude-workflow:docker:restart: export DOCKER_GID=$(getent group docker | cut -d: -f3) && PROJECT_PATH=${PROJECT_PATH:-$HOME} docker compose -f .claude/docker-compose.yml down && PROJECT_PATH=${PROJECT_PATH:-$HOME} docker compose -f .claude/docker-compose.yml up -d
scripts.claude-workflow:docker:build: export DOCKER_GID=$(getent group docker | cut -d: -f3) && PROJECT_PATH=${PROJECT_PATH:-$HOME} docker compose -f .claude/docker-compose.yml build
scripts.claude-workflow:docker: export DOCKER_GID=$(getent group docker | cut -d: -f3) && PROJECT_PATH=${PROJECT_PATH:-$HOME} docker compose -f .claude/docker-compose.yml down && PROJECT_PATH=${PROJECT_PATH:-$HOME} docker compose -f .claude/docker-compose.yml build && PROJECT_PATH=${PROJECT_PATH:-$HOME} docker compose -f .claude/docker-compose.yml up -d && docker compose -f .claude/docker-compose.yml logs -f
